title: Mass General Brigham Nature study: thymus health predicts longevity and cancer survival
description: An AI-driven analysis of routine chest CT scans shows that adults with healthier thymus glands have 50% lower all-cause mortality, 63% lower cardiovascular death, and 36% lower lung cancer incidence. Among cancer patients on immunotherapy, healthier thymuses correlated with 37% lower disease progression, reframing the once-vestigial organ as a major aging biomarker.

title: ASCO 2026: Galleri MCED first RCT cuts late-stage cancer diagnoses by 14%
description: The NHS-Galleri trial randomized 142,942 adults aged 50-77 to annual multi-cancer early detection blood testing. Over 3 years, screened participants saw a 14% reduction in stage IV diagnoses and 19% increase in stage I-III detection. While missing the primary endpoint, the trajectory supports MCED as a longevity-relevant preventive tool.

title: HAYA Therapeutics doses first cohort in HTX-001 cardiac fibrosis Phase 1
description: HAYA's antisense oligonucleotide targeting the WISPER lncRNA enters human testing — the first precision cellular-reprogramming trial for heart failure with fibrosis. Cardiac fibrosis underlies a major fraction of age-related mortality, making this a key proof of concept for the lncRNA targeting class.

title: Senolytics market projected $9.06B in 2026 rising to $14.33B by 2031
description: Mordor Intelligence forecasts 7.95% CAGR for senolytics and anti-aging pharmaceuticals through 2031, on top of $8.49B in 2024 longevity funding across 325 deals (31% later-stage). Catalysts ahead include Retro Biosciences RTR242 lysosomal Alzheimer's Phase 1 August interim and multiple senolytic readouts.

title: Saul Newman's 'Morbid' challenges supercentenarian data and mortality plateau
description: Reviewed in Nature, Newman's MIT Press book argues that biomarker-based longevity claims are calibrated to paperwork rather than verified biology, undermining the late-life mortality plateau and many regional longevity datasets. He calls for physics-based dating (amino-acid racemization, radiocarbon) before further aging policy decisions are made.

title: Thymus imaging biomarker linked to all-cause mortality in Nature paper
description: MGB and Harvard researchers publish Nature paper showing AI-scored thymic fat ratio on chest CT independently predicts mortality, cardiovascular death and cancer outcomes across 11,000+ patients.

title: ASCO 2026 frontMIND results reshape DLBCL first-line treatment
description: The frontMIND trial adding tafasitamab and lenalidomide to R-CHOP improved PFS in newly diagnosed high-intermediate or high-risk DLBCL, with longevity-relevant implications for older adults who dominate this disease.

title: SENOMAC trial: extended endocrine therapy benefits older breast cancer survivors
description: Phase 3 SENOMAC presented at ASCO 2026 shows axillary radiotherapy non-inferior to dissection in selected node-positive breast cancer, reducing arm-morbidity in long-term survivors.

title: Cs-131 collagen tile reduces brain metastasis recurrence in pivotal trial
description: GammaTile's permanent Cs-131 brachytherapy tile showed 87% local control at 12 months in resected brain metastases, an option for older patients who tolerate stereotactic radiosurgery poorly.

title: BioAge advances BGE-102 in obesity-longevity Phase 1b
description: BioAge moves its NLRP3 inhibitor BGE-102 into Phase 1b combination with a GLP-1 after the February $132.3M raise, targeting inflammaging in metabolic disease.

title: Japan's SenoRich debuts as first commercial senolytic supplement stack
description: SenoRich combines fisetin, quercetin-phytosome and piperlongumine in a senolytic protocol marketed to consumers in Japan, raising regulatory and quality-control questions tracked by Longevity.Technology.

title: Sinclair tells Popular Mechanics aging reversal is now an engineering problem
description: David Sinclair argues partial reprogramming has crossed from biology mystery to engineering scale-up, citing improving yamanaka-factor delivery, dose-response data and 2026 readouts from Life Bio and NewLimit.

title: Aging-US: precision geroprotection framework integrates clocks with omics
description: New Aging-US paper proposes coupling DNA methylation clocks, proteomic IL-6/CRP networks and metabolomic acylcarnitines to triage individuals into senolytic, mTOR-inhibitor or NAD+-restoring tracks.

title: Fight Aging June 1 newsletter: allostatic load ProAL50 and multi-omics clocks
description: This week's Fight Aging digest leads with the ProAL50 proteomic allostatic-load index, multi-omics clock convergence, nanomaterials for osteoarthritis cartilage repair, public-health policy futures and exceptional-longevity genetics.

title: Bar-Ilan SIRT6 activator extends lifespan in primates: preprint
description: Bar-Ilan team posts bioRxiv preprint reporting SIRT6 small-molecule activator BL-SIRT6-23 extending median lifespan 9% in marmosets while improving glucose tolerance, supporting a primate translation arc.

title: Elysium Health publishes TELI immune-age biomarker in Nature Aging
description: Elysium's TELI (T-cell-receptor Excision-circle Longevity Index) reproducibly predicts vaccine response and infection risk in adults over 60, opening a path to immune-age monitoring at consumer scale.

title: Daewoong and Turn Bio expand epigenetic reprogramming alliance to $400M
description: Daewoong Pharmaceutical extends its partnership with Turn Biotechnologies to include autoimmune indications, with up to $400M in milestones and joint IND filings targeted for 2027.

title: Insilico Medicine and Human Longevity Inc. ink AI biomarker deal
description: Insilico Medicine licenses its Precious2-GPT aging foundation model to Human Longevity Inc. for use in member precision-longevity programs, accelerating biomarker-to-protocol pipelines.

title: Retro Biosciences sets August interim for RTR242 lysosomal Alzheimer's Phase 1
description: Retro Biosciences confirms August 2026 interim safety and biomarker analysis for RTR242, its lysosomal-rejuvenation small molecule in Phase 1 for early Alzheimer's.

title: Putin reportedly pledges $26B to Russian biotech longevity program
description: WSJ reports Russian state plan to channel $26B into a longevity biotechnology directorate by 2030, modeled on Saudi Hevolution but with state research institutes at the center.

title: ARDD 2025 abstracts post: senolytics CAR-T and mitochondrial transplant lead
description: Copenhagen ARDD 2025 abstracts highlight senolytic CAR-T (Memorial Sloan Kettering), mitochondrial-transplant for HFpEF (Stanford) and gut-microbiome rejuvenation (Buck Institute) as the meeting's most-cited sessions.

title: Cure maps 7 VCs reshaping longevity capital
description: Cure analyzes seven funds (Apollo Health, Methuselah, R42, KdT, Cambrian Bio, Longevity Tech Fund, Healthspan Capital) totaling $3.1B AUM and their thematic bets in 2026.

title: Bezos and Thiel hold combined $314B in longevity-adjacent assets: report
description: Forbes tallies Jeff Bezos and Peter Thiel exposure to Altos, NewLimit, Unity, Loyal, Methuselah and Tally at a combined $314B influence on the longevity venture landscape.

title: RTÉ covers Dublin Longevity Summit: protocols for the rest of us
description: RTÉ Ireland recaps Dublin Longevity Summit emphasizing accessible protocols, GP integration and reimbursable preventive interventions over high-net-worth biohacking.

title: China CBE 2026 spotlights anti-aging functional ingredients
description: China Beauty Expo 2026 in Shanghai opens with a dedicated anti-aging pavilion featuring NMN, urolithin A and exosome cosmetic products from 130 exhibitors.

title: Tau-targeting longevity drug shows cognitive benefit in marmosets
description: A Science paper reports a brain-penetrant tau aggregation inhibitor reversing age-related cognitive decline in marmosets, supporting a healthspan-cognition arm of geroscience pipelines.

title: REP-0004 partial reprogramming hits Phase 1 first-in-human dosing
description: Repair Bio doses first patient with REP-0004, an mRNA partial-reprogramming therapy for non-arteritic anterior ischemic optic neuropathy, a sentinel longevity-mechanism trial.

title: Sinclair lab posts open-source AgeRev panel for partial reprogramming labs
description: David Sinclair's Harvard lab releases AgeRev v1, an open methylation panel and analysis pipeline to standardize partial reprogramming reporting across academic and biotech labs.

title: FoundMyFitness drops 90-minute Rhonda Patrick deep-dive on sauna and lifespan
description: Rhonda Patrick's new FoundMyFitness episode synthesizes 12 cohort studies and the Finnish KIHD update tying 4-7 sauna sessions per week to 40% lower all-cause mortality.

title: Peter Attia podcast: triphasic strength training for sarcopenia reversal
description: Attia's new episode walks through a triphasic strength training protocol (eccentric / isometric / concentric blocks) reversing sarcopenia in 60-79 year-olds with 12-week DXA-confirmed gains.
